Kissimmee FHA Loans

Buy a home in Kissimmee with as little as 3.5% down. Here's how FHA loans work in Osceola County, why Kissimmee is so FHA-friendly, and how to get pre-approved.

Kissimmee Home Loans

FHA loans in Kissimmee, Florida

Just south of Orlando, Kissimmee offers a more affordable path into the booming Central Florida market, with abundant new construction in communities like Poinciana and a diverse, growing population. That affordability plus new inventory makes it a natural FHA market — the statewide loan limit covers most homes, and 3.5% down opens the door for first-time buyers and families relocating to the Orlando area.

Osceola County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Kissimmee

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Kissimmee home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Kissimmee's affordable, fast-growing market, that covers the vast majority of homes, including many new builds. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Osceola County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable Orlando-area homes and new construction

Kissimmee lets buyers tap the Orlando job market at a lower price point, with lots of new construction that meets FHA standards easily — ideal for first-time buyers. Pair FHA with Florida down payment assistance and gift funds to minimize cash to close, and get pre-approved first so your offers stand out in a competitive metro.

Down payment help for Kissimmee buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Kissimmee buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Osceola County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Kissimmee

We help buyers throughout Kissimmee and Osceola County, including Poinciana, Celebration, downtown Kissimmee, and Buenaventura Lakes. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Kissimmee (Osceola County) for 2026?+
Osceola County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all Kissimmee homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Kissimmee good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — it's an affordable, new-construction-rich alternative to Orlando, making it one of the friendliest FHA markets in Central Florida.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Kissimmee?+
Yes — newer homes typically pass the FHA appraisal easily, and Kissimmee has lots of new inventory.
How much down payment do I need in Kissimmee?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Osceola County?+
Yes — Kissimmee, St. Cloud, Poinciana, and surrounding communities.
